name: Jello Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a large bowl, stirring until the sugar is completely dissolved.
2. In another large bowl, dissolve Jell-O powder in 6 cups of boiling water, then stir in 6 cups of cold water.
3. Stir the mixture into the sugar-water solution.
4. Add pineapple juice, lemon juice, and almond extract to the mixture.
5. When ready to serve, gently pour in the ginger ale and mix well.
